Journal.Title: Zhonghua kou qiang yi xue za zhi = Zhonghua kouqiang yixue zazhi = Chinese journal of stomatology
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhonghua Kou Qiang Yi Xue Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [International publication trends and hotspots of clinical oral implantology research in China].

Abstract.AbstractText: Objective: To analyze the current status, trends and research hotspots of clinical research on oral implantology published in international journals by scholars from China(excluding Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan), and to provide insights into research dynamics for scholars and institutions in related fields. Methods: Based on Web of Science Core Collection, 460 documents were screened. Bibliometric analysis was performed using CiteSpace, and institutional collaboration network, keyword co-occurrence mapping and time zone view of burst words were drawn to explore the characteristics of publications, research hotspots and frontiers. Results: The number of Chinese oral implantology clinical research publications increased year by year, and institutions such as Peking University and Shanghai Jiao Tong University were the core contributors. Research hotspots focus on bone augmentation techniques (e.g., bone regeneration, maxillary sinus lift) and immediate implantation, and the frontier direction is dynamic navigation and robot-assisted surgery. The research areas are mainly in dentistry and oral surgery, with notable interdisciplinary integration. The percentage of high-impact journals was significant. Conclusions: The bibliometric study visualized the hotspots of clinical research in the field of oral implantation published by Chinese scholars in international journals. Future efforts should focus on improving the evidence system by large-sample multicenter studies and strengthen the collaboration between teams to promote the development of the discipline.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Dental Implantation, Stomatology Hospital, School of Stomatology, Zhejiang University School of Medicine & Clinical Research Center for Oral Diseases of Zhejiang Province & Key Laboratory of Oral Biomedical Research of Zhejiang Province & Cancer Center of Zhejiang University & Engineering Research Center of Oral Biomaterials and Devices of Zhejiang Province, Hangzhou 310005, China.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhonghua Kou Qiang Yi Xue Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 目的： 分析我国学者在国际期刊上发表的口腔种植学临床研究的现状、发展趋势及研究热点，为相关领域学者和机构提供研究动态参考。 方法： 基于Web of Science核心合集筛选460篇文献，利用CiteSpace进行文献计量学分析，绘制机构合作网络、关键词共现图谱及突现词时区视图，探讨发文特征、研究热点与前沿。 结果： 我国口腔种植临床研究发文量逐年增长，北京大学、上海交通大学等机构为核心贡献者。研究热点集中于骨增量技术（如骨再生、上颌窦提升术）和即刻种植，前沿方向为动态导航与机器人辅助手术。研究领域以牙科、口腔外科为主，多学科交叉明显；高影响力期刊占比显著。 结论： 文献计量学研究直观地展现了我国学者在国际杂志中发表的口腔种植领域临床研究的热点，未来仍需大样本多中心研究完善证据体系，并加强团队间协作推动学科发展。.
